mechanics.excerpt: The prince had left his youngest sister; Yvonne Steiner Davion regent New Avalon his absence He returned to find Yvonne deposed and the Federated Commonwealth in the hands of Katherine Steiner- Davion . Apparently; Katherine had been plotting the takeover for years_ prelude to becoming the next First Lord of the Star League_ Even without realm however, Prince Victor remained politica force to be reckoned with; At the Second Whitting Conference , Precentor Martial Anastasius Focht of ComStar announced his retirement and named Victor as nis successor.
